sql_array: CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT, c INT);
INSERT INTO numbers (a, b, c) VALUES (3, 2, 5), (4, 6, 1), (7, 3, 2);
SELECT greatest(a, b, c) AS largest_value FROM numbers;
UPDATE numbers SET a = greatest(a, 10) WHERE b < 5;
SELECT SUM(greatest(a, b)) OVER () AS total_greatest FROM numbers;
